name: Stealth Group Holdings Ltd
analysis: SGI has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 28% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$1.0750. Trade idea: entry A$1.1400, stop A$0.8167, target A$1.3150 (0.54:1) — then trail it.
